# Here Handyman > Professional home repair and remodeling services with 25+ years of experience serving NY and IL communities

## Getting Started
Quick paths to getting your home project completed
- [Free Estimate Request](https://www.herehandyman.com/#contact): Get a no-obligation quote for your project
- [Call Us Directly](tel:+1516350081): Same-day service available at (516) 350-0801
- [Service Areas](#service-areas): Check if we serve your location in NY or IL

## Services
Complete handyman and remodeling solutions for homeowners
- [Kitchen Remodeling](#kitchen-remodeling): Full kitchen renovations, custom cabinetry, countertops, and islands
- [Bathroom Renovation](#bathroom-remodeling): Walk-in showers, vanities, tile work, and complete bathroom updates
- [General Handyman Services](#general-handyman): Plumbing, electrical, drywall, painting, and home maintenance
- [Flooring Installation](#flooring-services): Hardwood, tile, vinyl plank, and flooring repairs
- [Exterior Home Services](#exterior-services): Siding, exterior painting, deck repairs, and window installation
- [Emergency Repairs](#emergency-services): Same-day response for urgent home repair needs

## Service Areas
Local communities we proudly serve
- [New York Service Areas](#ny-service-areas): White Plains, Scarsdale, Yonkers, Hartsdale, and Westchester County
- [Illinois Service Areas](#il-service-areas): Plainfield, Naperville, Joliet, Bolingbrook, and Lisle

How to reach us and book service

- [Business Hours](#business-hours): Mon-Sat 8AM-5PM, Sunday emergency only

What makes us the trusted local choice

## Business Details
Company information and credentials
- **Experience**: 25+ years in handyman and remodeling industry
- **License**: Fully licensed and insured professional service
- **Service Type**: Residential handyman and remodeling services
- **Coverage**: Westchester County, NY and Will County, IL
- **Response Time**: Same-day service available for urgent needs

## Contact Information
Multiple ways to reach our team
- **Phone**: (516) 350-0801

- **Hours**: Monday-Saturday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Sunday Emergency Only

## Service Categories
Detailed service breakdown by type

### Kitchen Remodeling
- Complete kitchen renovations and remodels
- Custom cabinetry design and installation
- Kitchen island construction and electrical
- Countertop replacement (quartz, granite, laminate)
- Backsplash installation and tile work
- Appliance installation and plumbing connections
- Kitchen lighting and electrical upgrades

### Bathroom Renovation
- Full bathroom renovations and gut jobs
- Walk-in shower installation with glass doors
- Vanity and sink installation
- Tile flooring and wall tile installation
- Plumbing fixture updates and repairs
- Bathroom lighting and exhaust fans
- Shower door installation and waterproofing

### General Handyman Services
- Plumbing repairs and fixture installation
- Electrical work and outlet/switch installation
- Drywall repair, patching, and installation
- Interior and exterior painting services
- Carpentry and custom woodwork
- TV mounting and installation
- Furniture assembly and installation
- Home maintenance and repair services

### Flooring Services
- Hardwood flooring installation and refinishing
- Tile flooring (ceramic, porcelain, natural stone)
- Vinyl plank and laminate flooring
- Flooring repairs and patching
- Subfloor preparation and repair
- Transition strips and baseboard installation

### Exterior Services
- Exterior home repairs and maintenance
- Siding repair and installation
- Exterior painting and surface preparation
- Deck and porch repairs and construction
- Window and door installation
- Gutter cleaning and repair
- Exterior caulking and weatherproofing

### Emergency Services
- Same-day emergency repairs
- Plumbing leaks and water damage
- Electrical issues and outages
- Storm damage repairs
- Urgent home maintenance needs

## Service Process
Our proven approach to every project
1. **Initial Contact**: Call or submit online form for free estimate
2. **Project Assessment**: Detailed evaluation and transparent quote
3. **Scheduling**: Convenient appointment time that works for you
4. **Professional Service**: Clean, efficient work with attention to detail
5. **Final Inspection**: Customer satisfaction and quality guarantee

## Business Hours & Availability
When you can reach us and schedule service
- **Monday-Friday**: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- **Saturday**: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- **Sunday**: Emergency services only
- **Emergency Response**: Same-day service available
- **Service Areas**: White Plains NY, Plainfield IL, and surrounding communities
